senses.def_en: to list things or give all the facts or information about sth.
senses.example: Please detail all your expenses on this form.
senses.example_zh: 请把你的所有开支详细地列在这张表上。

entries.mnemonic: com(完全)+ment(思考)→彻底思考后再做评论→评论

senses.def_en: a remark that expresses a personal reaction or attitude
senses.example: No comment. 无可奉告。 // This idea deserves more than passing comment.
senses.example_zh: 这个想法值得慎重考虑。

senses.example: Her strange behavior caused a good deal of comment.
senses.example_zh: 她的反常行为引起了不少闲话。

senses.example: The discovery is hardly commented by the press.
senses.example_zh: 这个发现很少为报界所评论。

derivatives: commentator n. 解说者；新闻广播员 // commentary n. 实况报道；评论

senses.example: Local residents have reacted angrily to the news.
senses.example_zh: 当地居民对这一消息表示愤怒。

senses.example: Feminists reacted against the limitations of women's traditional roles.
senses.example_zh: 女权主义者反抗妇女传统角色的局限。

senses.example: Acids react with bases to form salts.
senses.example_zh: 酸与碱反应生成盐。

senses.example: react on each other
senses.example_zh: 相互起作用

derivatives: reactor n. 反应器；反应物

senses.example: What's your reaction to the rumors about you? 你对有关你的谣言有何反应？ // chain/nuclear reaction 连锁反应/(原子)核反应
The revolution was defeated by the forces of reaction.
senses.example_zh: 这场革命被反动势力打败了。

derivatives: reactionary a. 反动的 n. 反动分子

senses.def_en: to produce a vivid impression or image of
senses.def_zh: 给……以深刻的印象，使铭记
senses.example: The scenery of the Lugu Lake is strongly impressed on my memory.
senses.example_zh: 泸沽湖的景色给我留下了深刻的印象。

senses.example: The design was impressed on the cloth.
senses.example_zh: 图案被印在布上。

derivatives: impression n. 印象；印记 // impressive a. 给人印象深刻的

senses.def_en: seemingly effortless beauty of movement etc.
senses.example: The gymnast performed on the balance beam with an easy grace.
senses.example_zh: 体操运动员在平衡木上表演得优美自如。

senses.example: Every lover sees a thousand graces in the beloved object.
senses.example_zh: 情人眼里出西施。

senses.example: Payment is due today, but I gave her a week's grace.
senses.example_zh: 今天付款到期，但我给了她一个星期的宽限。

senses.example: Fine paintings graced the walls of the room.
senses.example_zh: 这些精美的绘画使四壁生辉。

derivatives: graceful a. 优美的；得体的

senses.example: The queen always appears in the public with a gracious smile.
senses.example_zh: 女王在公共场合出现时总是面带和蔼的笑容。

senses.example: gracious living
senses.example_zh: 安逸的生活

senses.example: My Gracious!
senses.example_zh: 天哪！

senses.def_en: loss of honor, respect, or reputation; shame
senses.example: You will bring disgrace on yourself by doing this.
senses.example_zh: 你这样做会给自己带来耻辱。

senses.example: He has been publicly disgraced for offences for which he was not guilty.
senses.example_zh: 他为莫须有的过错而被当众免职。

senses.example: The family was disgraced by the scandal.
senses.example_zh: 那件丑闻使全家人蒙羞。

extras.content: go into detail(s) 详细叙述，逐一说明 // in detail 详细地
People are tired of seeing their acts of kindness and service pass without comment. 译文：自己的善行和帮助没能得到回馈，这让人们很厌烦。
impress 常用于被动语态，不用于进行式。
with good grace 欣然地 You must learn to accept defeat with good grace. 你必须学会欣然接受失败。
